technical_description: Ranked / windowed analysis for patient demographics: 21 output column(s) sourced from 12 base table(s) (CLARITY_EPP, CLARITY_LOB, CLARITY_LOC, CLARITY_SER, COVERAGE...). Computed columns: Coverage Effective Date - 400, Coverage Term Date 410, Member Effective From Date 320, Member Effective Term Date 330, ROW. Constrained by: CVGEPT.COVERAGE_ID = CVG.COVERAGE_ID AND CVG.COVERAGE_TYPE_C = 2 /* Managed Care */ AND /* AND CVG.CVG_EFF_DT <= SYSDATETIME() */ /* AND (CVG.CVG_TERM_DT >= SYSDATETIME() OR CVG.CVG_TERM_DT IS NULL) */ CVGEPT.MEM_COVERED_YN = 'Y' AND CVGEPT.MEM_EFF_FROM_DATE <= GETDATE() AND (CVGEPT.MEM_EFF_TO_DATE >= GETDATE() OR CVGEPT.MEM_EFF_TO_DATE IS NULL); PGEPP.PLAN_GRP_ID = CVG.PLAN_GRP_ID AND PGEPP.BEN_PLAN_EFF_DATE <= GETDATE() AND (PGEPP.BEN_PLAN_TERM_DT >= GETDATE() OR PGEPP.BEN_PLAN_TERM_DT IS NULL); EPTV.PAT_ID = CVGEPT.PAT_ID AND EPTV.IS_VALID_PAT_YN = 'Y'; CVGLOCSER.COVERAGE_ID = CVG.COVERAGE_ID AND CVGLOCSER.MEMBER_ID = CVGEPT.PAT_ID AND CVGLOCSER.EFF_DATE <= GETDATE() AND (CVGLOCSER.TERM_DATE >= GETDATE() OR CVGLOCSER.TERM_DATE IS NULL) AND (CVGLOCSER.DELETED_FLAG_YN = 'N' OR CVGLOCSER.DELETED_FLAG_YN IS NULL); CSA.CVG_ID = CVG.COVERAGE_ID AND CSA.LINE = 1; CSA2.CVG_ID = CVG.COVERAGE_ID AND CSA2.LINE = 2.
business_description: Identifies the most recent patient demographics, limited to Coverage Type C = 2 and Mem Covered Yn = 'Y' and Mem Eff From Date <= today and Mem Eff To Date >= today or Mem Eff To Date is null; Ben Plan Eff Date <= today and Ben Plan Term Date >= today or Ben Plan Term Date is null; Is Valid Patient Yn = 'Y'; Eff Date <= today and Term Date >= today or Term Date is null and Deleted Flag Yn = 'N' or Deleted Flag Yn is null; Line = 1; Line = 2.
primary_purpose: Ranked / windowed analysis for patient demographics
key_metrics: Coverage Effective Date - 400, Coverage Term Date 410, Member Effective From Date 320, Member Effective Term Date 330, ROW
source_tables: CLARITY_EPP, CLARITY_LOB, CLARITY_LOC, CLARITY_SER, COVERAGE, COVERAGE_MEMBER_LIST, CVG_SUBSCR_ADDR, PATIENT, PLAN_GRP_BEN_PLAN, VALID_PATIENT, ZC_SUBSC_RACE, ZC_TAX_STATE
